Brush gallery

Source: vignettes/articles/brush-gallery.Rmd
brush-gallery.Rmd

This vignette compares installed MyPaint brush previews with two mypaintr render scenes. Use the brushes parameter to control which set is rendered:

  • "sample": ten hand-picked good brushes
  • "best": the brushes recommended in the introduction vignette
  • "all": every installed brush
Showing 44 brushes from the best set.

classic/charcoal

classic/coarse_bulk_1

classic/coarse_bulk_2

classic/coarse_bulk_3

classic/dry_brush

classic/ink_blot

classic/ink_eraser

classic/kabura

classic/pen

classic/pencil

classic/slow_ink

classic/textured_ink

deevad/2B_pencil

deevad/4H_pencil

deevad/chalk

deevad/spray2

Dieterle/HalfToneCMY#1

Dieterle/Posterizer

experimental/bubble

experimental/track

experimental/pixelblocking

experimental/sewing

experimental/small_blot

experimental/spaced-blot

experimental/speed_blot

experimental/subtle_pencil

kaerhon_v1/inkster_l

ramon/2B_pencil

ramon/B-pencil

ramon/Pen
